summary: Multimodal CRM intake pipeline hardening: 5 root causes fixed, 2 new output modes, structured intent parser, binding precedence fix, UI sanitization hardening. 43 new acceptance tests all passing.

implementedFixAreas.description: Explicit user text now has highest priority over session/UI context for client binding
New structured intent parser for Czech CRM commands (8 verb types, 9 destinations, 9 field patterns)
Added contact_update_from_image and payment_details_portal_update output modes with full planner + response mapper support
CRM extraction text hints boost structured classification; intent-aware confidence override in orchestrator
Extended internal flag/pattern filtering prevents confidence %, GUARDRAIL_, safetyFlag, outputMode from reaching advisor UI

caveats: Payment portal write path: preview-ready but actual write endpoint not wired
Contact field-level CRM patch: creates advisory note with extracted fields, full updateContact wiring pending
3 pre-existing test failures unrelated to this pass
